game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **艾希 - ICEY** ICEY is a 2D side-scrolling action game where players control the protagonist, ICEY, through combat arenas and environments using a virtual joystick for movement and virtual buttons for light attacks, heavy attacks, a dash, and a jump. Players execute high-speed combos by chaining attacks and dodges, aiming to defeat waves of enemies with varied attack patterns and engage in multi-phase boss battles where identifying and exploiting weaknesses is crucial. A unique meta-narrative system features a persistent narrator providing instructions; players can follow these directives or explore off-path areas and defy the narrator, unlocking hidden lore, alternative dialogue, and multiple endings. Progression is driven by defeating bosses to unlock new levels and by uncovering narrative secrets through exploration and defiance, which also reveals new combat abilities or character upgrades. Difficulty scales through increased enemy density, more complex attack patterns, and higher health pools for later foes, with player health depleting upon taking damage and a game over occurring when health reaches zero.
game_info.description: You are ICEY, a cybernetic warrior fighting through waves of enemies in a mysterious facility. Battle through combat arenas, defeat enemies with fluid combos, and face off against powerful bosses. But there's a twist - a narrator guides your path. Will you follow their instructions, or defy them to uncover hidden secrets and alternate endings? Your choices shape the narrative as you fight for survival.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move left/right, look up/down
Space: Light attack (fast, can chain)
Shift: Heavy attack (powerful, slower)
Z: Dash (quick dodge with invincibility frames)
Up Arrow (while grounded): Jump
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement, combat mechanics, and enemy interactions. Validates that the player can move, attack enemies, take damage, and that combat mechanics work correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move around the arena, perform light and heavy attacks on enemies, use dash to avoid attacks, and test jump mechanics. Engage with enemies to validate hit detection and damage systems.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves, attacks connect with enemies, enemies take damage and are defeated, player can dodge attacks. Test validates core combat loop functionality.
TEST_1.description: Tests basic movement, combat mechanics, and enemy interactions. Validates that the player can move, attack enemies, take damage, and that combat mechanics work correctly.
TEST_1.strategy: Move around the arena, perform light and heavy attacks on enemies, use dash to avoid attacks, and test jump mechanics. Engage with enemies to validate hit detection and damage systems.
TEST_1.expected: Player successfully moves, attacks connect with enemies, enemies take damage and are defeated, player can dodge attacks. Test validates core combat loop functionality.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal winning strategy by defeating all enemies and bosses efficiently. Validates that the win condition is achievable and the game can be completed.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use aggressive combo chains mixing light and heavy attacks, dash to avoid damage, prioritize defeating enemies quickly, exploit boss patterns, and follow or defy narrator based on strategic advantage.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player defeats all waves of enemies and boss encounters, reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state, demonstrating that the game is beatable with skilled play.
TEST_2.description: Tests the optimal winning strategy by defeating all enemies and bosses efficiently. Validates that the win condition is achievable and the game can be completed.

TEST_2.expected: Player defeats all waves of enemies and boss encounters, reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state, demonstrating that the game is beatable with skilled play.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests the narrator defiance mechanic and exploration system. Validates that players can choose alternate paths and unlock hidden content.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Deliberately move in directions opposite to narrator's guidance, explore boundary areas, attempt to access hidden zones, and trigger alternate narrative branches.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player successfully defies narrator, unlocks hidden dialogue and lore, discovers secret areas, and experiences alternate narrative paths that diverge from the main story.
TEST_3.description: Tests the narrator defiance mechanic and exploration system. Validates that players can choose alternate paths and unlock hidden content.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests player survivability under continuous enemy pressure. Validates health system, damage mitigation through dashing, and game over conditions.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Engage multiple enemies simultaneously, intentionally take some damage to test health system, use dash invincibility frames to avoid fatal hits, test the boundaries between survival and defeat.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Health depletes correctly when hit, dash provides invincibility, health management is crucial for survival, and GAME_OVER_LOSE triggers when health reaches zero.
TEST_4.description: Tests player survivability under continuous enemy pressure. Validates health system, damage mitigation through dashing, and game over conditions.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests boss battle mechanics including multi-phase transitions, pattern recognition, and weakness exploitation. Validates that boss encounters are challenging but fair.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Focus exclusively on boss battles, learn attack patterns, identify vulnerable moments, exploit weaknesses during specific phases, and use appropriate attack types for each phase.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Boss transitions through multiple phases correctly, attack patterns are learnable and avoidable, player can exploit weaknesses to deal increased damage, and boss is defeatable with skill.
TEST_5.description: Tests boss battle mechanics including multi-phase transitions, pattern recognition, and weakness exploitation. Validates that boss encounters are challenging but fair.
